tools.name: privateQuotes.deleteQuote
tools.description: Delete a quote. The user needs to be the owner of the quote to be able to delete it.

tools.name: privateQuotes.getQuoteList
tools.description: Get the list of quotes in your private collection.

tools.name: privateQuotes.patchQuote
tools.description: Update a quote

tools.name: privateQuotes.postQuote
tools.description: Add a new quote to your private collection. Same as 'PUT' but added since some clients don't handle PUT well.

tools.name: privateQuotes.postQuoteTagsAdd
tools.description: Add a tag to a given Quote.

tools.name: privateQuotes.postQuoteTagsRemove
tools.description: Remove a tag from a given quote.

tools.name: privateQuotes.putQuote
tools.description: Add a new quote to your private collection.

tools.name: qshow.deleteQshow
tools.description: Delete a qshow.

tools.name: qshow.getQshow
tools.description: Gets a details about a qshow.

tools.name: qshow.getQshowList
tools.description: Get the list of Qshows in They Said So platform.

tools.name: qshow.getQshowQuotes
tools.description: Get the quotes in a given Qshow.

tools.name: qshow.patchQshow
tools.description: Update an existing qshow.

tools.name: qshow.postQshowQuotesAdd
tools.description: Add a quote to a given Qshow.

tools.name: qshow.postQshowQuotesRemove
tools.description: Remove a quote to a given Qshow.

tools.name: qshow.putQshow
tools.description: Create and add a new qshow to your private collection.

tools.name: quote.deleteQuoteDislike
tools.description: Remove the disLike for the given Quote as a user of the API Key.

tools.name: quote.deleteQuoteLike
tools.description: Remove the Like for the given Quote as a user of the API Key.

tools.name: quote.getQuote
tools.description: Gets a `Quote` with a given `id`.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteAuthorsPopular
tools.description: Gets a list of popular author names in the system.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteAuthorsSearch
tools.description: Gets a list of author names in the system.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteCategoriesPopular
tools.description: Gets a list of popular `Quote` Categories.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteCategoriesSearch
tools.description: Gets a list of `Quote` Categories matching the query string.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteRandom
tools.description: Gets a `Random Quote`. When you are in a hurry this is what you call to get a random famous quote.

tools.name: quote.getQuoteSearch
tools.description: Search for a `Quote` in They Said So platform. Optional `category` , `author`, `minlength`, `maxlength` params determines the filters applied while searching for the quote.

tools.name: quote.postQuoteDislike
tools.description: Dislike the given Quote as a user of the API Key. Same as `put` but a convenient alias for those clients that don't support `put` cleanly.

tools.name: quote.postQuoteLike
tools.description: Like the given Quote as a user of the API Key. Same as `PUT` but a convenient alias for those clients that don't support `PUT` cleanly.

tools.name: quote.putQuoteDislike
tools.description: Dislike the given Quote as a user of the API Key. Some clients don't cleanly support `PUT`, in such scenarios use the `POST` version of this.

tools.name: quote.putQuoteLike
tools.description: Like the given Quote as a user of the API Key. Some clients don't cleanly support `PUT`, in such scenarios use the `POST` version of this.

tools.name: quoteImages.deleteQuoteImage
tools.description: Delete a quote image. The user needs to be the owner of the quote image to be able to delete it.

tools.name: quoteImages.deleteQuoteImageBackground
tools.description: Delete a background image file. The user needs to be the owner of the background image to be able to delete it.

tools.name: quoteImages.deleteQuoteImageFont
tools.description: Delete a font file. The user needs to be the owner of the font to be able to delete it.

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImage
tools.description: Gets a Quote image for a given id. Response can be an image file as a binary or a base64 encoded contents wrapped in json. `TODO`

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImageBackgroundList
tools.description: Lists background images in your private collection.

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImageBackgroundSearch
tools.description: Searches for a background image with a given tag.

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImageFontList
tools.description: Lists background images in your private collection.

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImageFontSearch
tools.description: Searches for a font with a given tag.

tools.name: quoteImages.getQuoteImageSearch
tools.description: Gets a Random Quote image. Optional `category` param determines the category of quote used in the image. Optional `author` param gets the quote image of a given author.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageBackground
tools.description: Add an image for use later as a quote background image.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageBackgroundTagsAdd
tools.description: Add a tag to a given Image.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageBackgroundTagsRemove
tools.description: Remove a tag from a given Image.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageFont
tools.description: Add a font file for use later in creating a quote image. This is essentially a `PUT` but not many clients handle PUT with binary stream i.e. a file, gracefully.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageFontTagsAdd
tools.description: Add a tag to a given font.

tools.name: quoteImages.postQuoteImageFontTagsRemove
tools.description: Remove a tag from a given Font.

tools.name: quoteImages.putQuoteImage
tools.description: Create a new quote image for a given quote. Choose background colors/images , choose different font styles and generate a beautiful quote image. Did you just had a feeling of being a god or what?!

tools.name: quoteOfTheDay.getQod
tools.description: Gets `Quote of the Day`. Optional `category` param determines the category of returned quote of the day

tools.name: quoteOfTheDay.getQodCategories
tools.description: Gets a list of `Quote of the Day` Categories.

tools.name: quoteOfTheDay.getQodLanguages
tools.description: Gets a list of supported languages for `Quote of the Day`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
